infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to scan Tripper Dash Wi-Fi credentials.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tripper Dash Navigator uses your location to provide turn-by-turn navigation and stream guidance to the Tripper Dash cluster.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Background location is required to continue navigation when the screen is off.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Discovers Tripper Dash on local Wi-Fi.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Tripper Dash Navigator to use your location for navigation.
